title: TCIL Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Nursing Officer, Pharmacist and Other Posts
description: The Telecommunications Consultant India Limited (TCIL) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 10 Nursing Officers, Pharmacists,  Lab Technicians, OT Technicians, Mortuary Assistants, Dressers, and Plaster Room Assistants. Interested and eligible candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their 10th, 12th, B. Pharm, B.Sc Nursing, GNM, B.Sc., and DMLT can apply for the TCIL Notificati...
